errors: Missing device consistency check: forward does not verify that all input tensors are on the same CUDA device, which can cause invalid memory access in the custom kernel.
suggested_fixes: Add TORCH_CHECK(W.device() == X.device() && X.device() == A.device() && A.device() == B.device(), "All tensors must be on the same device"); in check_inputs.
warnings: Kernel uses O(d^3) naive algorithm, which may be extremely slow for large d.
